## Scope Guardrails
- [ ] No unrelated refactors were included.
- [ ] No secrets or credentials were introduced.
- [ ] Database migrations were included **only if explicitly required by issue scope**.
- [ ] New pages/views were included **only if explicitly required by issue scope**.
